1658 |     def _analysis_phase_files_summary(self, max_files: int = 5) -> str:
1659 |         state = getattr(self, "_analysis_phase_state", None)
1660 |         if state is None or not state.files_read:
1661 |             return "(none)"
1662 |         files = sorted(state.files_read)
1663 |         summary = ", ".join(files[:max_files])
1664 |         if len(files) > max_files:
1665 |             summary += f", ... and {len(files) - max_files} more"
1666 |         return summary
1667 | 
1668 |     def _build_analysis_phase_summary(self) -> str:
1669 |         """Build deterministic phase summary metadata for broad analysis compaction."""
1670 |         state = getattr(self, "_analysis_phase_state", None)
1671 |         if state is None:
1672 |             return ""
1673 |         return (
1674 |             f"phase={state.phase}; "
1675 |             f"files_read={len(state.files_read)}; "
1676 |             f"read_units={len(state.read_units)}; "
1677 |             f"discovery_tools={state.discovery_tools_used}; "
1678 |             f"inspect_reads={state.inspect_reads}; "
1679 |             f"verify_reads={state.verify_reads}; "
1680 |             f"files={self._analysis_phase_files_summary()}"
1681 |         )

1683 |     def _deferred_read_answer_prompt(self, gated_read_count: int) -> str:
1684 |         """Force final synthesis after post-synthesis source reads were deferred."""
1685 |         task_desc = getattr(self, "_current_task_description", "")
1686 |         ledger = getattr(self, "_evidence_ledger", None)
1687 |         summary = ledger.latest_phase_summary_text() if ledger is not None else ""
1688 |         claims = self._build_grounding_claims_summary()
1689 |         return (
1690 |             "[SYSTEM] Phased analysis answer boundary:\n"
1691 |             f"{gated_read_count} source read(s) were deferred after the synthesis boundary.\n"
1692 |             "The next turn is answer phase: no tools will be available. Produce the final answer now from the phase summary, "
1693 |             "evidence references, and confidence boundaries. Every confirmed claim must cite recorded evidence ids like [ev_xxx]. "
1694 |             "If evidence is incomplete, state the uncertainty instead of reading more.\n\n"
1695 |             f"{summary}\n\n"
1696 |             f"{claims}\n\n"
1697 |             f"[TASK ANCHOR] Your current task is: {task_desc}"
1698 |         )

1700 |     def _analysis_answer_boundary_summary(self, gated_read_count: int) -> str:
1701 |         """Return a safe terminal summary when the model keeps reading after deferral."""
1702 |         ledger = getattr(self, "_evidence_ledger", None)

1704 |         if summary:
